diff:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/build.yml b/.github/workflows/build.yml
index abc..def 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/build.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/build.yml
@@ -17,6 +17,15 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-java@v5
         with:
           ...
+      - name: Cache Gradle caches
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.gradle/caches
+            ~/.gradle/wrapper
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'gradle/libs.versions.toml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
diff --git a/gradle.properties b/gradle.properties
index abc..def 100644
--- a/gradle.properties
+++ b/gradle.properties
@@ -24,3 +24,7 @@ signAllPublications=true
+
+# Enable Gradle build cache and parallel execution for faster CI builds.
+org.gradle.caching=true
+org.gradle.parallel=true

exploration_log.aha_moment: The .java-version file already exists with value 25, so only gradle.properties and build.yml needed changes.

dead_ends.explored: Whether to add actions/cache for build/ output directories
dead_ends.why_irrelevant: The task mentions ~/.gradle/caches and build/ but gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5 already caches Gradle home; explicit caching of build/ would conflict

exploration_log.hindsight: Should verify whether gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5 already does caching (it does) so the explicit actions/cache step is somewhat redundant, but the task asks for it specifically.

alternatives: Also update build.yml with actions/cache (as task asks)
key_decisions.decision: Add both gradle.properties properties and explicit actions/cache step in build.yml jvm job
key_decisions.reasoning: Task explicitly requests both changes; .java-version already exists so that part is skipped

search_sequence.reasoning: Task targets this file directly for adding caching properties
search_sequence.result: File has publishing settings but missing org.gradle.caching and org.gradle.parallel

search_sequence.reasoning: Task asks to update CI workflow and check for .java-version
search_sequence.result: build.yml uses gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5 (already caches); .java-version exists with '25'

solve_notes: Added `org.gradle.caching=true` and `org.gradle.parallel=true` to `gradle.properties`. Added an explicit `actions/cache@v4` step in the `jvm` job of `build.yml` to cache `~/.gradle/caches` and `~/.gradle/wrapper`. The `.java-version` file already existed with value `25`, so no change was needed there.
task_text:
The `gradle.properties` file configures publishing settings
(`mavenCentralPublishing`, `signAllPublications`) but does not enable
the Gradle build cache or configure `org.gradle.caching=true` for
faster CI builds. The `.github/workflows/build.yml` workflow sets
`GRADLE_OPTS` for JVM tuning but does not cache Gradle's
`~/.gradle/caches` or `build/` output directories. Add
`org.gradle.caching=true` and `org.gradle.parallel=true` to
`gradle.properties`. Update `.github/workflows/build.yml` to use
`actions/cache` for Gradle caches and wrapper distributions. Also
add a `.github/workflows/.java-version` entry if missing to pin
the JDK version used in CI.

test_selection.coverage_skip_reason: Auditor could not generate baseline coverage — see auditor report

thrash_preventing_defs.name: jvm
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: seeing the full jvm job confirms it already uses gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5 (which caches gradle home), showing where to add the explicit actions/cache step without duplicating

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set is the three changed configuration entries. The thrash_preventing set adds the jvm job structure so an agent can see where to insert the actions/cache step without accidentally duplicating caching already done by gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5.
